calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Feb-25-2004 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-25-2004 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: Michael S. Rossoff Atty.for Plaintiff, John Stewart Company, a California Corp., Tasha Roy, Asst. Administrator

Samuel Pete, Defendant in Propria Persona

Settlement Conference held. Parties entered into signed agreement that was not filed. Settlement terms contained in the signed agreement for premises located at 238 Eddy Street, #419, S.F., CA. was read into the record as follows:
Deft will pay $712.00 for rent.
Deft will pay $600.00 for atty fees and costs.
Payments will be made in 12 months installments of $120.00/month beginning March.1, 2004.
Deft. can stay on the premises if he pays his rent on or before the 1st of each month.
If deft. breaches the agreement, pltf. may with 24 hours' notice seek ex-parte application
to obtain a release from the stay & obtain judgment for immediate restitution of premises.

JPT: Erik Peterson; Clerk: M.Schwartz-Scott/E. Estacio; CSR: Rhonda Aquilina

payments.description: FIRST FILING UD COMPLT LESS THAN 2,500
